data.title: Sensirion Supports Space Innovation with Advanced Sensor Technology
data.description:
Sensirion Holding AG ( (CH:SENS) ) has shared an update.

Sensirion is supporting the WOBBLE2 project by BEARS e.V. with its high-precision SLF3S-4000B sensors, aiding in the development of innovative satellite tanks as part of the REXUS/BEXUS program. This collaboration highlights Sensirion’s role in advancing space technology and underscores its commitment to fostering educational and practical applications in the field.

More about Sensirion Holding AG

Sensirion is a leading developer and manufacturer of sensors and sensor solutions, specializing in environmental and flow sensor technologies. Founded in 1998, the company employs around 1,200 people globally and serves various sectors including automotive, industrial, medical, HVAC, and consumer electronics, focusing on efficiency, health, safety, and comfort.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: €1.29B

data.title: Oracle Japan Reports Strong Q3 Performance with Increased Sales and Profits
data.description:
Oracle Japan ( (JP:4716) ) has provided an update.

Oracle Corporation Japan reported a strong performance in the third quarter of the fiscal year ending May 31, 2025, with significant increases in net sales and profits compared to the previous year. The company achieved a 9.1% increase in net sales and an 11.6% rise in profit for the period, reflecting its solid market positioning and effective operational strategies. Despite a decrease in total assets and net assets, Oracle Japan maintained a stable financial position, with a slight decline in the ratio of shareholders’ equity. The company has not revised its dividend outlook or forecast for the fiscal year, indicating confidence in its ongoing financial stability and growth prospects.

More about Oracle Japan

Oracle Corporation Japan operates in the technology industry, focusing on providing enterprise software and hardware systems, including database management systems, cloud solutions, and enterprise resource planning (ERP) software. The company is a key player in the Japanese market, serving a wide range of industries with its robust technology solutions.

YTD Price Performance: 0.43%

Average Trading Volume: 271

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $12.22B

data.title: Tomoku Co., Ltd. Merges Subsidiaries to Enhance Housing Services
data.description:
Tomoku Co., Ltd. ( (JP:3946) ) has issued an announcement.

Tomoku Co., Ltd. announced the merger of its subsidiaries, Sweden House Co., Ltd. and Sweden House Reform Co., Ltd., to streamline operations and enhance service offerings in the housing market. This strategic move is designed to provide a comprehensive service from construction to renovation, aiming to increase corporate value and optimize resource utilization, with minimal impact on the company’s financial results.

More about Tomoku Co., Ltd.

Tomoku Co., Ltd. operates in the housing industry, focusing on the construction and renovation of custom-built homes. The company aims to provide high-quality homes with features like high airtightness and thermal insulation, catering to a market that values durability and energy efficiency.

data.title: Warehouses Estates Belgium Announces Agenda for 2025 General Meeting
data.description:
Warehouses Estates Belgium S.C.A. ( (DE:WPK) ) has issued an update.

Warehouses Estates Belgium S.C.A. has announced the agenda for its upcoming Ordinary General Meeting scheduled for April 22, 2025, at its headquarters in Gosselies. The meeting will cover the approval of the annual accounts for 2024, a dividend distribution, and the remuneration report. Shareholders will also vote on the discharge of the Sole Director and Auditor, and the determination of the director’s fees for 2025. The announcement outlines the conditions for shareholder participation, including registration and voting procedures.

More about Warehouses Estates Belgium S.C.A.

data.title: Tenma Corporation Revises Financial Forecasts Upwards for FY 2025
data.description:
The latest update is out from TENMA ( (JP:7958) ).

Tenma Corporation has revised its financial forecasts for the fiscal year ending March 2025, indicating an expected increase in net sales and profits. This adjustment is attributed to a shift in production from China to Southeast Asia, improved production efficiency through automation, and favorable currency exchange rates due to the yen’s depreciation. These changes are anticipated to positively impact the company’s financial performance and stakeholder interests.

More about TENMA

Tenma Corporation operates in the manufacturing industry, focusing on producing and supplying a variety of products, with a significant market presence in Southeast Asia.

data.title: Superactive Group Faces Delays in 2024 Financial Reporting Amid Liquidity Challenges
data.description:
Superactive Group Company Limited ( (HK:0176) ) has shared an announcement.

Superactive Group Company Limited has announced a delay in the publication of its 2024 annual results and a possible delay in the dispatch of its 2024 annual report due to financial constraints. The company is facing liquidity issues, which have hindered its ability to commence the annual audit, potentially leading to non-compliance with Hong Kong Stock Exchange listing rules and a possible suspension of trading.

More about Superactive Group Company Limited

Superactive Group Company Limited is a company incorporated in Bermuda, operating with limited liability. It is listed on the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong and is involved in various business activities, although specific industries and products are not detailed in the announcement.

data.title: I-NET Corp. Expands Insurance Sector Capabilities with ACU Acquisition
data.description:
An announcement from I-Net Corporation ( (JP:9600) ) is now available.

IST-Software Co., Ltd., a wholly-owned subsidiary of I-NET Corp., has acquired ACU CORPORATION, a company specializing in IT consulting and system development for the life insurance industry. This acquisition aims to leverage synergies between IST-Software’s existing insurance business and ACU’s expertise, enhancing their service offerings in the life insurance sector. The immediate financial impact on I-NET Corp. is minimal, but the strategic move positions the company to better serve the diverse needs of life insurance companies, potentially strengthening its market position.

More about I-Net Corporation

I-NET Corp. is a company involved in information processing services, system development services, and sales of system equipment. It operates through its group company, IST-Software Co., Ltd., which is based in Tokyo and focuses on similar business activities.

data.title: Makino Milling Machine Co. Engages in Acquisition Talks with Nidec Corporation
data.description:
Makino Milling Machine Co ( (JP:6135) ) has shared an announcement.

Makino Milling Machine Co., Ltd. has received a proposal from Nidec Corporation to become a wholly-owned subsidiary through a tender offer. The company has been in ongoing discussions with Nidec, sending multiple letters of inquiry to assess the proposal’s impact on corporate value and shareholder interests. Makino has requested Nidec to delay the tender offer commencement and increase the share purchase threshold, but Nidec has yet to provide a definitive response. The outcome of these negotiations could significantly affect Makino’s operational control and market positioning.

More about Makino Milling Machine Co

Makino Milling Machine Co., Ltd. operates in the manufacturing industry, focusing on milling machines and related equipment. The company is listed on the Prime Market of the Tokyo Stock Exchange and is recognized for its precision machining solutions.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.92B
